faqs.question: What types of cockroaches are common in Maplewood homes?
faqs.answer: Maplewood properties most commonly experience German cockroach and American cockroach infestations. German cockroaches prefer kitchens and bathrooms, while American cockroaches often enter through basements and drainage areas, especially in older Maplewood homes with established plumbing systems.
